name: Dotmatics Scientific Data Platform API
what_it_does: Scientific data management platform with REST API — connecting research tools (ELN, registration, assays, informatics) with data science workflows for pharmaceutical and biotech companies, enabling data integration across chemistry, biology, and genomics research.
use_cases: Querying compound registration data and biological assay results via REST API
Integrating ELN (Electronic Lab Notebook) data with analysis pipelines
Fetching chemical structure and property data for computational workflows
Syncing experimental data from instruments to Dotmatics via API
Building custom reporting dashboards on research data via API
not_for: Clinical trial management (use Veeva or Medidata for GxP environments)
General document management without scientific context
Consumer health apps or non-research data
best_when: A pharmaceutical or biotech company needs to integrate their ELN, compound registration, and assay data into a connected scientific informatics platform with API access.
avoid_when: You need GxP-validated clinical trial systems, general LIMS without scientific informatics, or are outside life sciences research.

auth.notes: API key from Dotmatics administration. Bearer token auth. Instance-scoped access. Authentication via platform-specific tokens. Enterprise deployment means self-hosted or private cloud — endpoints vary.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only pricing. UK-based company. Owned by Insightful Science (formerly Dotmatics). Portfolio includes Prism, SnapGene, Geneious, Protein Metrics. $100M+ ARR. Life sciences focus. 1,000+ pharmaceutical and biotech customers. API for data integration between scientific tools.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for scientific data entities (compounds, assays, experiments). Bearer token auth. No webhooks. Documentation less accessible than Benchling — enterprise portal access required. Self-hosted or private cloud deployment means endpoint varies per customer. 21 CFR Part 11 compliance for regulated data.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read operations fully idempotent. Data registration may create new records. Assay data queries idempotent. Scientific calculations deterministic.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise deployment — API endpoint varies per customer instance
21 CFR Part 11 compliance affects what can be automated without audit trail
Scientific data types (structures, sequences) require domain-specific handling
Portfolio acquisition (Insightful Science) means API consistency across tools varies

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. 21 CFR Part 11 compliant for regulated environments. GDPR compliant. GxP validated options. Self-hosted for maximum IP protection. Pharmaceutical IP is highly sensitive — enterprise security standards required.
